title: Tool Selection, Calls, Results, and State Updates · Loop Forensics
summary: Implement a typed client-side tool loop over read and write tools. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a tested tool-loop state machine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select tools from capability, authority, cost, and evidence requirements.
Validate tool arguments and results at the host boundary.
Parallelize independent reads while sequencing dependent or mutating calls.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
